splash.title: BUILD TO INSPIRE
splash.subtitle: Save the Planet. One Home at a Time.

steps.text: I just came from science class and my mind is BLOWN 🤯
My teacher said — every time we use electricity, a power plant burns coal...
...and releases 0.710 kg of CO₂ for EVERY single unit!
Fans spinning. Fridge humming. AC blasting. I saw my house differently.
How much CO₂ is MY home producing? 🤔
I'm going to find out. And I'm going to FIX it.

1.title: Energy Intro
1.desc: This mission explores how household appliances consume electricity and their carbon footprint.

2.title: Home Audit
2.desc: Audit your home and discover hidden energy wasters.

3.title: Vampire Power
3.desc: Hunt down appliances that waste energy in standby mode.

5.title: City Grid
5.desc: Manage the energy grid for an entire city.

q1.question: Which of these is NOT classified as an essential appliance?
q1.explanation: ACs are classified as Non-Essential. Fans are the primary essential cooling device in India.

q2.question: A charger plugged in but not charging still uses electricity. True or False?
q2.explanation: Idle chargers draw 0.1–0.5W. Confirmed by U.S. DOE LBNL.

q3.question: Which room typically has the MOST appliances?
q3.explanation: Kitchen has fridge, induction, microwave, mixer, LED tube = 5+ appliances.

q4.question: The Wi-Fi router runs how many hours per day?

q5.question: Which appliance is the WORST hidden consumer in standby mode?
q5.explanation: Set-Top Box standby (8–15W) nearly equals its active power.

q6.question: How much energy can you save by switching from a regular ceiling fan (70W) to a BLDC fan (28W)?
q6.explanation: A BLDC fan uses just 28W compared to 70W — 60% saving!

q7.question: Which appliance uses the MOST watts in your home?
q7.explanation: The Geyser runs at 2,000 watts — the highest.

q8.question: An induction cooktop is 85% efficient vs a gas stove at what efficiency?

q9.question: How much CO₂ per kWh does India's electricity grid emit?
q9.explanation: India's grid emission factor is 0.710 kg CO₂/kWh.

q10.question: Setting your AC to 24°C instead of 18°C saves approximately what percentage?

rewards.goodEffort: 💪 Good effort! Try again to improve!

Living Room.name: 📍 Living Room
Living Room.display_text: This is the living room. The ceiling fan, TV, and AC are the big energy consumers here. 🌀📺❄️
Living Room.voice_text: This is the living room. The ceiling fan, TV, and AC are the big energy consumers here.

Kitchen.name: 📍 Kitchen
Kitchen.display_text: Welcome to the kitchen! This is where some of the most energy-hungry appliances live — the refrigerator, microwave, and electric iron. 🍳🧊
Kitchen.voice_text: Welcome to the kitchen! This is where some of the most energy-hungry appliances live.

Bedroom.name: 📍 Bedroom
Bedroom.display_text: Arjun's bedroom! The charger is plugged in even when not charging — that's called phantom load. 🔌⚡
Bedroom.voice_text: Arjun's bedroom! The charger is plugged in even when not charging. That's phantom load.

Bathroom.name: 📍 Bathroom
Bathroom.display_text: The bathroom has the washing machine and the geyser. The geyser uses 2000 watts — one of the highest in the house! 🚿🔥
Bathroom.voice_text: The bathroom has the washing machine and the geyser. The geyser uses 2000 watts.

ceiling_fan.name: Ceiling Fan
ceiling_fan.display_text: Hey there! I'm the Ceiling Fan 🌀 — the most-used appliance in Indian homes! I spin at 70 watts, keeping you cool for about ₹100/month. I use up to 20% of your household electricity. Tip: switch to a BLDC fan (28W) and save 60% energy!
ceiling_fan.voice_text: Hey there! I'm the Ceiling Fan, the most-used appliance in Indian homes! I spin at 70 watts, keeping you cool for about 100 rupees per month.
ceiling_fan.funFact: A BLDC fan uses just 28W vs my 70W — that's like replacing a bike with a bicycle in energy terms!
ceiling_fan.energyTip: Switch to a BLDC fan (28W) and save 60% energy compared to a regular ceiling fan.

led_bulb.name: LED Bulb (9W)
led_bulb.display_text: Hello! I'm the LED Bulb! 💡 I replaced the old 60W incandescent bulb and use just 9 watts — saving 80% energy! India's UJALA scheme distributed over 370 million LED bulbs. I cost only ₹16/month to run!
led_bulb.voice_text: Hello! I'm the LED Bulb! I replaced the old 60 watt incandescent bulb and use just 9 watts.
led_bulb.funFact: 370 million LED bulbs distributed under India's UJALA scheme — enough to light a small galaxy!
led_bulb.energyTip: Always choose LED over CFL or incandescent. 80% less energy, 25x longer life.

tv_smart.name: Smart TV (43" LED)
tv_smart.display_text: Hey, eyes over here! 📺 I'm your Smart TV! I use 75 watts when you're binge-watching, but here's the plot twist — my Wi-Fi module stays active even in standby, drawing 1–3W for updates. Modern me uses far less than old CRT TVs!
tv_smart.voice_text: I'm your Smart TV! I use 75 watts when you're binge-watching, but my Wi-Fi stays active in standby.
tv_smart.funFact: Old CRT TVs used 80-150W. I use just 75W — and I'm three times bigger!
tv_smart.energyTip: Turn off at the wall switch when not in use to save standby power.

ac_1_5ton.name: AC (1.5 Ton Inverter)
ac_1_5ton.display_text: Chill... I'm the Air Conditioner. ❄️ I'm the biggest energy consumer in your home at 1,300 watts. Set me to 24°C instead of 18°C to save up to 25% energy!
ac_1_5ton.voice_text: I'm the Air Conditioner. I'm the biggest energy consumer at 1300 watts. Set me to 24 degrees.
ac_1_5ton.funFact: Setting your AC to 24°C instead of 18°C saves 25% energy!
ac_1_5ton.energyTip: Set temperature to 24°C, clean filters monthly, use a fan alongside to circulate air.

fridge.name: Refrigerator (250L)
fridge.display_text: I'm the Refrigerator. 🧊 I run 24/7, but my compressor cycles on and off. Don't open my door too often — cold air escapes!
fridge.voice_text: I'm the Refrigerator. I run 24 hours a day, but my compressor cycles on and off.
fridge.funFact: Every time you open my door for 30 seconds, I use extra energy to cool back down!
fridge.energyTip: Don't open the door too often. Keep the fridge 3/4 full for best efficiency.

washing_machine.name: Washing Machine (7kg FL)
washing_machine.display_text: Whoooosh! 🌀 I'm the Washing Machine! I spin at 420 watts. Even when I look 'off', I draw 1-2W in standby!
washing_machine.voice_text: I'm the Washing Machine! I spin at 420 watts. Even when off, I draw 1-2 watts in standby.
washing_machine.funFact: Washing with cold water saves up to 90% of the energy used for heating!
washing_machine.energyTip: Wash with cold water and always run full loads to maximize efficiency.

geyser.name: Water Heater (Geyser)
geyser.display_text: I'm the Geyser — the HOTTEST appliance in your home! 🔥 At 2,000 watts, I'm extremely powerful but used briefly. A solar water heater can replace me!
geyser.voice_text: I'm the Geyser, the hottest appliance in your home! At 2000 watts, extremely powerful.
geyser.funFact: A solar water heater has zero running cost and saves ₹12,000+ per year!
geyser.energyTip: Heat water for just 10 minutes before bathing. Consider a solar water heater.

induction.name: Induction Cooktop
induction.display_text: Sizzle sizzle! 🍳 I'm the Induction Cooktop! At 1,500W I sound energy-hungry, but I'm 85% efficient vs gas stoves at only 40%!
induction.voice_text: I'm the Induction Cooktop! At 1500 watts, but I'm 85% efficient versus gas at 40%.
induction.funFact: I'm over twice as efficient as a gas stove — 85% vs 40%!
induction.energyTip: Use flat-bottom vessels for best contact and efficiency on induction.

microwave.name: Microwave Oven
microwave.display_text: BEEP BEEP! 📡 I'm the Microwave Oven! My digital clock runs 24/7, drawing 3–5W continuously even when I'm not cooking! I'm a HIDDEN CONSUMER!
microwave.voice_text: I'm the Microwave Oven! My clock draws 3-5 watts continuously. I'm a hidden consumer!
microwave.funFact: My clock alone uses more electricity per year than charging your phone!
microwave.energyTip: Unplug me when not in use. My standby clock wastes 26-44 kWh per year.

mixer_grinder.name: Mixer Grinder
mixer_grinder.display_text: BRRRRR! ⚡ I'm the Mixer Grinder — fast and ENERGETIC! At 600 watts I only run for 15 minutes a day! My annual consumption is super low!
mixer_grinder.voice_text: I'm the Mixer Grinder! At 600 watts but only 15 minutes a day. Super low annual use.
mixer_grinder.funFact: Despite 600W, I use less electricity per year than a single LED bulb left on 24/7!
mixer_grinder.energyTip: Grind in short bursts to avoid overheating the motor and wasting energy.

wifi_router.name: Wi-Fi Router
wifi_router.display_text: Connect... connect... 📶 I'm the Wi-Fi Router! I run 24/7/365 but everyone forgets about me because I'm only 6–12W. 😄
wifi_router.voice_text: I'm the Wi-Fi Router! I run 24/7 but I'm just 6-12 watts. A hidden consumer.
wifi_router.funFact: I never sleep. 24 hours a day, 365 days a year. That's dedication!
wifi_router.energyTip: Switch me off at night to save energy. You don't need internet while sleeping!

set_top_box.name: Set-Top Box (DTH)
set_top_box.display_text: Shhhh... 📦 I'm the Set-Top Box, the WORST HIDDEN CONSUMER! My standby power (8–15W) is nearly the same as active! Just turn me off at the plug!
set_top_box.voice_text: I'm the Set-Top Box, the worst hidden consumer! My standby uses almost as much as active.
set_top_box.funFact: I waste 70–131 kWh/year just in standby — more than a ceiling fan uses!
set_top_box.energyTip: Always turn me off at the wall plug. My standby wastes more than your ceiling fan!

led_tube.name: LED Tube Light
led_tube.display_text: Hello! I'm the LED Tube Light 💡 — the backbone of room illumination! At 18W, I replace old 40W fluorescent tubes, saving over 50% energy!
led_tube.voice_text: I'm the LED Tube Light! At 18 watts, saving over 50% compared to fluorescent tubes.
led_tube.funFact: One LED tube = same light as a 40W fluorescent but less than half the power!
led_tube.energyTip: Replace all fluorescent tubes with LED tubes for immediate 50%+ energy savings.

phone_charger.name: Phone Charger
phone_charger.display_text: I'm the Phone Charger 🔌 — a tiny hidden consumer! Even when your phone is fully charged, I draw 0.1–0.5W sitting plugged in. That's phantom power!
phone_charger.voice_text: I'm the Phone Charger. Even fully charged, I draw 0.1-0.5 watts. That's phantom power!
phone_charger.funFact: If every Indian unplugged their charger when done, we'd save enough to power a small city!
phone_charger.energyTip: Unplug me when not charging. Every charger left plugged in wastes phantom power.

table_fan.name: Table Fan
table_fan.display_text: Hey, I'm the Table Fan! 🌪️ I'm the portable cooling companion at 50W. I use 30% less power than a ceiling fan! Use me instead of AC on mild days to save 90% energy!
table_fan.voice_text: I'm the Table Fan! At 50 watts, I use 30% less power than a ceiling fan.
table_fan.funFact: I can reduce 'feels like' temperature by 3-4°C, letting you set AC 3 degrees higher!
table_fan.energyTip: Use instead of AC on mild days to save up to 90% cooling energy.

level2.introQuote: ਆਓ ਦੇਖੀਏ ਇਹ ਉਪਕਰਣ ਕਿੰਨੀ ਬਿਜਲੀ ਵਰਤਦੇ ਹਨ!

level3Story.thought1: ਹੁਣ ਮੈਨੂੰ ਸਮੱਸਿਆ ਪਤਾ ਹੈ। ਮੇਰਾ ਘਰ ਹਰ ਸਾਲ 4.1 ਟਨ CO₂ ਬਣਾਉਂਦਾ ਹੈ। ਇਹ ਇੱਕ ਛੋਟੀ ਕਾਰ ਦੇ ਭਾਰ ਦੇ ਬਰਾਬਰ ਹੈ... ਸਿਰਫ਼ ਬਿਜਲੀ ਤੋਂ।
level3Story.thought2: ਮੈਂ ਉਪਕਰਨ ਬੰਦ ਕਰ ਸਕਦਾ ਹਾਂ। ਕੁਸ਼ਲ ਉਪਕਰਨ ਖਰੀਦ ਸਕਦਾ ਹਾਂ। ਪਰ ਕੀ ਇਹ ਕਾਫ਼ੀ ਹੈ? ਕੋਈ ਵੱਡਾ ਹੱਲ ਹੋਣਾ ਚਾਹੀਦਾ ਹੈ...
level3Story.sleepText: ਉਸ ਰਾਤ, ਅਰਜੁਨ ਸੋਚਣਾ ਬੰਦ ਨਹੀਂ ਕਰ ਸਕਿਆ...
level3Story.dreamHint: ਤੁਹਾਡੇ ਸੁਪਨਿਆਂ ਵਿੱਚ ਕੁਝ ਉਡੀਕ ਕਰ ਰਿਹਾ ਹੈ...
